subcodes.title: Du’a’ li’n-Nuri’l-Ahmar
subcodes.first_line: O God! I beseech Thee by Thy Divinity in its most glorious manifestation, and all Thy divinity is glorious in Thy sight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. اللهم انی اسئلک عن الوهیتک باعظمها و کل الوهیتک عظمه عندک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @angels, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
